mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO room_visit_histories ( room_no, user_uuid, visit_count, last_visited_at ) VALUES ( #{roomNo}, #{userUuid}, 1, NOW() )
ON CONFLICT (user_uuid, room_no) DO UPDATE SET visit_count = room_visit_histories.visit_count + 1, last_visited_at = NOW()
mapper.select:
SELECT
r.room_no, r.room_title, r.room_thumbnail,
r.category_no, c.category_name,
r.now_users AS current_users, r.max_users,
FALSE AS live, (r.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days') AS new_room, (r.now_users >= r.max_users) AS full, r.room_premium AS premium, r.room_private,
( r.room_private = FALSE AND r.now_users < r.max_users AND r.expired_at > NOW() ) AS joinable,
r.created_at, r.expired_at, rvh.last_visited_at, rvh.visit_count,
NULL::BIGINT AS average_study_seconds
FROM room_visit_histories rvh
INNER JOIN rooms r ON rvh.room_no = r.room_no
INNER JOIN categories c ON r.category_no = c.category_no
WHERE rvh.user_uuid = #{userUuid}
ORDER BY rvh.last_visited_at DESC, r.created_at DESC, r.room_title ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
r.room_no, r.room_title, r.room_thumbnail,
r.category_no, c.category_name,
r.now_users AS current_users, r.max_users,
FALSE AS live, (r.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days') AS new_room, (r.now_users >= r.max_users) AS full, r.room_premium AS premium, r.room_private,
( r.room_private = FALSE AND r.now_users < r.max_users AND r.expired_at > NOW() ) AS joinable,
r.created_at, r.expired_at, rvh.last_visited_at, rvh.visit_count,
NULL::BIGINT AS average_study_seconds
FROM room_visit_histories rvh
INNER JOIN rooms r ON rvh.room_no = r.room_no
INNER JOIN categories c ON r.category_no = c.category_no
WHERE rvh.user_uuid = #{userUuid}
ORDER BY rvh.visit_count DESC, rvh.last_visited_at DESC, r.created_at DESC, r.room_title ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
